matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: user registration with valid data module: user registration source pages: 2 preconditions: test data: - username: john_doe - password: password123 - name: john doe - email: john.doe@example.com test steps: 1. user calls `registeruser()` on the main component. 2. main calls `getdata()` on the user. 3. user returns the provided data to main. 4. main calls `verifyvaliddata()` on the usersdatabase. 5. usersdatabase returns true. 6. main calls `saveuserdata()` on the usersdatabase. expected result: user registration is successful and the user is added to the database.

test case id: tc-user-003 title: user login with valid credentials module: user login source pages: 3 preconditions: user is registered in the database. test data: - email: john.doe@example.com - password: password123 test steps: 1. user sends login request with email and password to the main component. 2. main requests user validation from the users database. 3. users database returns true. 4. main sends 'ok' response to the user. expected result: user login is successful and an 'ok' message is received by the user.

test case id: tc-user-002 title: user registration with invalid data module: user registration source pages: 2 preconditions: test data: - username: john_doe - password: short - name: john doe - email: john.doe@example.com test steps: 1. user calls `registeruser()` on the main component. 2. main calls `getdata()` on the user. 3. user returns the provided data to main. 4. main calls `verifyvaliddata()` on the usersdatabase. 5. usersdatabase returns false. expected result: user registration fails due to invalid password and an error message is returned to the user.
test case id: tc-user-006 title: retrieve user data with invalid credentials module: user data retrieval source pages: 3 pre preconditions: test data: test steps: expected result:

test case id: tc-user-005 title: retrieve user data with valid credentials module: user data retrieval source pages: 3 preconditions: user is registered in the database. test data: - email: john.doe@example.com - password: password123 test steps: 1. user sends a request to retrieve their data. expected result: user data is successfully retrieved and displayed to the user.

test case id: tc-profile-001 title: change profile with valid data module: profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - new username: johndoe - new password: newpassword123 - new name: john doe - new email: johndoe@example.com test steps: 1. user initiates the changeprofile() process. 2. main requests new data from the user. 3. user provides the new data to main. 4. main sends the data to the users database for verification. 5. users database returns true. 6. main updates the user data in the users database. 7. main informs the user of the successful change. expected result: profile change is successful and the user's data is updated in the database.

test case id: tc-user-004 title: user login with invalid credentials module: user login source pages: 3 preconditions: user is registered in the database. test data: - email: john.doe@example.com - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. user sends login request with email and password to the main component. 2. main requests user validation from the users database. 3. users database returns false. expected result: user login fails and an 'error' message is received by the user.

test case id: tc-profile-002 title: change profile with invalid data module: profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - new username: johndoe - new password: short - new name: john doe - new email: johndoe@example.com test steps: 1. user initiates the changeprofile() process. 2. main requests new data from the user. 3. user provides the new data to main. 4. main sends the data to the users database for verification. 5. users database returns false. expected result: profile change fails due to invalid password and an error message is displayed.

test case id: tc-category-001 title: add category with valid data module: category management source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - category name: historical sites test steps: 1. user adds a new category. expected result: category is successfully added to the database.

test case id: tc-trip-001 title: create trip with valid data module: trip creation source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - city: new york - country: usa - finaldate: 2023-10-15 - planid: 1 test steps: 1. user creates a new trip. 2. trip is associated with a plan. 3. trip includes a dailyplan with weather information. 4. trip includes a placetovisit categorized by a category. expected result: trip creation is successful and all associated data is stored correctly.

test case id: tc-trip-005 title: list trips with valid data module: trip listing source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in and has multiple trips. test data: - no specific data required. test steps: 1. user requests to list all trips. expected result: all trips are listed successfully and displayed to the user.

test case id: tc-weather-001 title: retrieve weather information for a daily plan module: weather retrieval source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: dailyplan exists with a valid weather entry. test data: - dailyplan id: 1 test steps: 1. main retrieves the weather information for the specified dailyplan. expected result: weather information is retrieved successfully and displayed to the user.

test case id: tc-category-002 title: add category with invalid data module: category management source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - category name: historical sites test steps: 1. user attempts to add a new category with a duplicate name. expected result: category addition fails due to duplicate name and an error message is displayed.

test case id: tc-dailyplan-001 title: create daily plan with valid data module: daily plan management source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: user is logged in and has a plan. test data: - dailyplan day: 2023-10-15 - weather high: 25 - weather low: 15 test steps: 1. user creates a new dailyplan. 2. dailyplan includes weather information. expected result: dailyplan is successfully created and stored in the database.

test case id: tc-trip-003 title: update trip data module: trip management source pages: 4, 5 preconditions: user is logged in and has a trip. test data: - updated city: los angeles - updated country: usa - updated finaldate: 2023-10-20 - updated planid: 2 test steps: 1. user initiates the updatetrip() process. 2. main retrieves new data from the user. 3. main updates the trip data in the trips database. 4. main lists the updated trip data to the user. expected result: trip data is successfully updated and the updated data is displayed to the user.
